diagnosticContext.formula:
Refresh(Users);
If(
    !IsBlank(email_input.Text) &&
    !IsBlank(password_input.Text),

    If(
        password_input.Text =
            LookUp(
                Users,
                Email = email_input.Text,
                Password
            ),

        Set(gblCurrentUser, email_input.Text);
        If(
            email_input.Text = "leader@gmail.com",
            Navigate(team_leader_assign),
            Navigate(update_availability)
        ),

        Notify(
            "Invalid email or password. (FOR DEMO PURPOSES: USER1 - Email = user1@gmail.com Password = abc123 USER2 - Email = user2@gmail.com Password = def456 TEAM LEADER - Email=leader@gmail.com Password=leader123)",
            NotificationType.Error
        )
    ),

    Notify(
        "Please fill in all required fields.",
        NotificationType.Error
    )
)

Filter(
    Users,
    Email <> "leader@gmail.com"
)

Navigate(volunteer_notifications);

Select(Parent)

Refresh(Users);
If(
    !IsBlank(email_input.Text) &&
    !IsBlank(password_input.Text),

    If(
        password_input.Text =
            LookUp(
                Users,
                Email = email_input.Text,
                Password
            ),

        Set(gblCurrentUser, email_input.Text);
        If(
            email_input.Text = "leader@gmail.com",
            Navigate(team_leader_assign),
            Navigate(update_availability)
        ),

        Notify(
            "Invalid email or password. (FOR DEMO PURPOSES: USER1 - Email = user1@gmail.com Password = abc123 USER2 - Email = user2@gmail.com Password = def456 TEAM LEADER - Email=leader@gmail.com Password=leader123)",
            NotificationType.Error
        )
    ),

    Notify(
        "Please fill in all required fields.",
        NotificationType.Error
    )
)

Refresh(Users);
If(
    !IsBlank(email_input.Text) &&
    !IsBlank(password_input.Text),

    If(
        password_input.Text =
            LookUp(
                Users,
                Email = email_input.Text,
                Password
            ),

        Set(gblCurrentUser, email_input.Text);
        If(
            email_input.Text = "leader@gmail.com",
            Navigate(team_leader_assign),
            Navigate(update_availability)
        ),

        Notify(
            "Invalid email or password. (FOR DEMO PURPOSES: USER1 - Email = user1@gmail.com Password = abc123 USER2 - Email = user2@gmail.com Password = def456 TEAM LEADER - Email=leader@gmail.com Password=leader123)",
            NotificationType.Error
        )
    ),

    Notify(
        "Please fill in all required fields.",
        NotificationType.Error
    )
)

diagnosticContext.formula:
Refresh(Users);
If(
    !IsBlank(email_input.Text) &&
    !IsBlank(password_input.Text),

    If(
        password_input.Text =
            LookUp(
                Users,
                Email = email_input.Text,
                Password
            ),

        Set(gblCurrentUser, email_input.Text);
        If(
            email_input.Text = "leader@gmail.com",
            Navigate(team_leader_assign),
            Navigate(update_availability)
        ),

        Notify(
            "Invalid email or password. (FOR DEMO PURPOSES: USER1 - Email = user1@gmail.com Password = abc123 USER2 - Email = user2@gmail.com Password = def456 TEAM LEADER - Email=leader@gmail.com Password=leader123)",
            NotificationType.Error
        )
    ),

    Notify(
        "Please fill in all required fields.",
        NotificationType.Error
    )
)

Filter(
    Users,
    Email <> "leader@gmail.com"
)

            script: data.context.diagnosticContext.formula || '',
            spanStart: data.context.diagnosticContext.span.start,
            spanEnd: data.context.diagnosticContext.span.end
          },
          data: data
        }
